hops.context: Natural products, compounds that play an important role in the production of a wide variety of bioactive compounds, including antibiotics and pharmaceuticals.

question: Which of the following is an accurate representation of the hierarchical classification of bioactive compounds in pharmaceutical research?

options.A: Pharmaceuticals include bioactive compounds, within which antibiotics are classified, all being types of enzymes.
options.B: Bioactive compounds are a type of antibiotics, which are part of pharmaceuticals, all of which are natural products.
options.C: Antibiotics are a subset of pharmaceuticals, which belong to bioactive compounds, ultimately categorized under natural products.
options.D: Bioactive compounds include antibiotics, which are a type of pharmaceutical, classifying them all as compounds.

explanation: The correct path established by the paper indicates that bioactive compounds encompass antibiotics, which are subsequently categorized as a type of pharmaceutical, and both fall under the broader category of compounds.
context: Natural products, compounds that play an important role in the production of a wide variety of bioactive compounds, including antibiotics and pharmaceuticals. | including antibiotics and pharmaceuticals. | including antibiotics and pharmaceuticals.
